name: ai-companion
title: AI Companion
author: lveillard
description: AI companions with 76 RCON commands. Pathfinding nav. Blueprint construction. Logistics (haul/refuel). Combat crew (patrol/nest-clear/repair). Orchestration: task-board reservations, standing roles (guard/refuel/maintain), goal-decomposition plans + world/recipe survey. Unified status. Hybrid mining. FLE-inspired queues. Factorio 2.x compatible.
